'''5-S''' was a chrome-colored droid owned by the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] pirate Captain [[Swagg]], prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].

The captain desired to steal several [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] relics from the [[Gungan Sacred Place/Legends|Gungan Sacred Place]] and to this end, he employed 5-S along with its fellow droids [[3-S]] and [[4-S]] to destroy the arena in [[Lake Umberbool]], but the attempt was thwarted by [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] and [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Fassa (Gungan)|Fassa]] resulting in the destruction of 4-S.

3-S and 5-S were then captured by the Security Forces of [[Otoh Gunga/Legends|Otoh Gunga]] and were de-activated, but Swagg returned to the city and released the droids.
